item.description:
Tom Pelissero reposteó Rich Eisen Show @RichEisenShow · 1h
@TomPelissero
Could we get some grand #NFLDraft announcement of Aaron Rodgers' return to #HereWeGo? And what are some possible trades we should keep on the look out for next week?
#NFL 1 2 15 5 mil

item.title: ColinSimmons__: Jordan Schultz reposteó Colin Simmons @ColinSimmons__ · 2h oh nice Cita Jordan Schultz @Schultz_Report · 2h BREAKING: T
item.description: Jordan Schultz reposteó Colin Simmons @ColinSimmons__ · 2h oh nice Cita Jordan Schultz @Schultz_Report · 2h BREAKING: The #Texans and 2x Pro Bowl DE Will Anderson Jr. have finalized a 3-year, $150M extension that makes him the highest paid non-QB in NFL history, per multiple sources. 11 15 341 35 mil
